title: cystium nigricalyce
intro: Cystium nigricalyce, also known as Black Snakeroot or False Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the Buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and calm muscle spasms. The health benefits of Cystium nigricalyce include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and whooping cough, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Cystium nigricalyce is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments.
